textByHash.a594cc8ca8beaa4b966d04579fd075ece4bab46f: Yes, er, welcome to the zoo! I'm afraid I'm kind of busy right now; what was it you wanted?
textByHash.214d933629f06d0d1b4bfb7390d73a6a9fb625f7: Well... maybe. How much do you know about hunting?
textByHash.230b4323ffa6467edcbced9b3d6d65caf0f54b88: No, I could do with some help, but I'm afraid I need somebody with a little more experience.
textByHash.41d645e637d345cb0bbc72ef9d6e59707624794e: Actually, now that you come to mention it, you might be able to help me.
textByHash.5e26eddc7e68fb9d60f71bb7d57b1075f63acdc6: A few weeks ago we had a delivery of a northern ferret. They're funny little creatures. Turns out they're tricksy little blighters too.
textByHash.f146053185fc2ad1b611809747e71f7f7138da6f: Whilst we were unloading him from the cart he managed to escape his cage. What's more he gave the driver a nasty nip on the way out too.
textByHash.aa8b8d4f7586fe2ed56f6df5c626c382c57d6fdc: This was obviously a bit of a blow, you can't make a new attraction without any animals.
textByHash.c64e5799af41b78a4e6d7d101a7ee3998d0a5273: We got in contact with one of our associates, a huntsman called Nickolaus, who agreed to capture us another.
textByHash.b20c23679d2619b6c862f228b64238e45531f15a: Funny thing is we haven't heard from him for some time now. I don't suppose you'd mind having a look for him?
textByHash.a3d24692355ca180a5d6e3d9ddf40e049ecde9ef: Well the northern ferret is mostly found around the mountains just west of the Gnome Stronghold, so that would probably be as good a place as any to start looking.
textByHash.82eb1a6161e57272ec5111200e96dd499808f61c: Oh well, I'm sure he'll be okay out there on his own.
textByHash.b4561572268858b049d835c14fc2f7a34b613a6e: Ah, hello again. Have you had any luck finding out about Nickolaus' whereabouts yet?
textByHash.e5a41e2d29f77b9fbb7136db04de979df9d83121: Like I said, he's most likely to be camping out somewhere to the west of the Gnome Stronghold.
textByHash.670757d8c4da9b33126f468824dcdbbee5d6457b: Ah, hello again. Have you had any luck finding a clue as to Nickolaus' whereabouts yet?
textByHash.e3a394ee8c17e441cb934c16105cfad297262d36: Giant eagles? What a strange notion. Well, regardless, if you've found him can you tell him to hurry up with that ferret.
textByHash.2e93b0842cbabd5e7ac4d03ab531fc13e68db052: You do? Ah, yes, wonderful, I never doubted you for a second. That'll make an excellent addition to the zoo.
textByHash.00add5aefbfe6c686dd904f025c911bfed3f7c2f: All I know is that I did what I was asked.
textByHash.c358f614612a3768f5d8476f3e6bd436146d0c71: Glough paid me to go to this gnome on a hill. I gave the gnome a seal and he gave me some Daconia rocks to give to Glough.
textByHash.a7e5619c05fff6f6b0d4684efbf00a15c4c0cc27: I've been doing it for weeks, this time though Glough locked me up here! I just don't understand it.
textByHash.f44ae1fbc06c16c861945894593b82e1ad4fac3b: I don't know what he's up to. If you want to find out, you'd better search his home.
textByHash.1e6d70a6c51c43afd184a201a307de24610616b0: Hello adventurer. Have you figured out what's going on?
textByHash.d44dacf70c185495a9f8cccf7ee320bfc5034c4a: To get to the bottom of this you'll need to search Glough's home.
textByHash.a9d1f8b0e88708cb77dc1158975abf5794db88bb: So they got you as well?
textByHash.27fd46a46d8d34d8341fae8b136d385fab09b1ef: I shouldn't tell you this adventurer. But if you want to get to the bottom of this you should go and talk to the Karamja Shipyard foreman.
textByHash.81ff216147c16635020c67a10dc36a7f3d1c0543: Glough sent me to Karamja to meet him. I delivered a large amount of gold. For what? I don't know. He may be able to tell you what Glough's up to. That's if you can get out of here. You'll find him
textByHash.0fedc5ce39a99532cfe79be4113126c939114755: in the Karamja Shipyard, east of Shilo Village. Be careful! If he discovers you're not working for Glough, there'll be trouble! The sea men use the password Ka-Lu-Min.
textByHash.08e82057753ef23be83b438984604857271495a2: Go and see the foreman in the Karamja jungle, there's a shipyard there, you might find some clues. Don't forget the password is Ka-Lu-Min; if they realise that you're not working for Glough there'll be trouble!
textByHash.568b82f7ddc3f3034ec7964bc37722110699d119: I wouldn't put it past him, the Gnome's crazy!
textByHash.c3fc5113916771fcb0c3bf475428284f75d40601: Hmm... you could be in luck! Before Glough had me locked up I heard him mention that he'd left his chest key at his girlfriend's house. She lives just west of the toad swamp.
textByHash.bf1e65217b60bc1b616bfdf0f6342e1e3af51a8f: Go to the king and tell him! Finally you have proof. Surely King Narnode will believe you now and set me free!
textByHash.4d0e5def387c91ef0f05b0c330ccde4533b77dd4: We get them from all over the place! The most exotic creatures have been brought back by explorers and sold to us.
textByHash.43a8c6805367172acc63b38021a357cc59629ed8: He's from a very far away land, we couldn't find out more as the explorer who brought him back died shortly afterwards!
textByHash.234c0ffda26061e1f6e92dd68c4422bc9d5e9980: Well he seems to be just as vicious as the one we lost, but we're still very grateful for your help in acquiring him.
textByHash.9571f0a9cd1de4d0c2ac95972723338ce0ccf6fb: Er, oh! Well that's very kind of you, but we don't really need another ferret at the moment, I'm afraid. We're having enough trouble taming the one we've got.
